title: Restore movie joystick scrub as discrete 15-second skip steps
summary: 0.6.52 fixes movie joystick scrub by routing the non-trigger stick path through the existing 15-second skip transport instead of analog-rate accumulation, which had been producing much smaller live movement than intended.
changes: The CUA non-trigger movie scrub path now reuses the existing discrete skip-forward and skip-backward transport actions.
Trigger-modified movie transport remains the separate next and previous media path.
This slice stays entirely inside the CUA input module and does not widen player transport, scene-builder, or slideshow behavior.
reasoning: Live testing showed repeated paused joystick scrubs only advanced around one second per action, which proved the analog-rate interpretation was not matching the intended product behavior.
Using the already-proven discrete skip transport is safer than layering another scale correction on top of the analog scrub path.
operatorVisibleOutcomes: Movie joystick scrub should again move in clear 15-second increments instead of tiny live nudges.
No slideshow, volume, or scene-builder changes ride along with this slice.
knownIssues: This slice does not yet advance slideshow, right-stick volume, or deferred gaze work.
The parked Unity shell dirt remains intentionally outside this version.
